negative_variants.description: ADC Static Linearity Monitor: never reports nonzero code error.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: reports only the latest sampled error and forgets the maximum once the ADC output recovers.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: decodes the observed ADC word with reversed MSB/LSB order.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: rounds the ideal code instead of using bin-floor static quantization.
ADC Static Linearity Monitor: uses seven bins for the ideal three-bit ADC code.
